case_title: PHAN LE HUYNH VS. MARK PAVLICHENKO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-30-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PAVLICHENKO, MARK

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUYNH, PHAN LE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAVLICHENKO, MARK $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,075.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES OF $1500.00 FOR PERSONAL INJURY, AND $500.00 FOR PLAINTIFF'S INSURANCE DEDUCTIBLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-06-2010 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HUYNH, PHAN LE AS TO DEFENDANT PAVLICHENKO, MARK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-06-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-06-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-06-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. FLORRIA PAVLICHENKO INTERPRETS ENGLISH/RUSSIAN - RUSSIAN/ENGLISH ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. AMY WONG INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PAVLICHENKO, MARK
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
